titleStmt.title: SII 39.188: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 188. (A.R. No. 188 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL VIJAYAGAṆḌAGOPĀLADĒVA-5TH YEAR

summary.p: This inscription refers to the sale of land for 1300 paṇam which was sent to the temple by some brāhamana individuals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirapuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī suntarapāṇ puraṭṭāti mātattu Orunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmarkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭu tiruppati cittirametit tiruppukku
kāṇi vilaippramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Eṅkaḷ kāṇi ṉūrarāṉa Utamacoḻac caturvetimaṅkalattu Attikkuṟi Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅku Oṉṟaraiyum Ikkuṭi varatarājapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār
Eḻupatu kuṭuttukoṇṭa paṅku kālum tiruppuṭkuḻiyul pārum tāmāle cila veḷḷāḷark ttaṅkaḷ Opāti viṟṟomeṉṟu pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttu ciṟutu paṇamum paṟṟi Avarkaḷum maṉattuppokaiyil
ḷḷak kaṭavomalla Avarāḷi koṇṭu poṉ paṇattai śrī paṇṭārattār tantu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka pramāṇam paṇṇikkoḷḷuṅ koḷ kaiyil Ittiruvuṭkuḻi makaṉ va ntaruvāraiyilaṭuvittu pramāṇam Eḻutipa
ttaiñcum Ivaṉ kaiyyil kuṭutta paṇam Eḻupattaiñcum Āka paṇam nūṟṟaimpatuṅ kuṭuttuk koṇṭa paṅku kālum Ārāvamutu paṭṭaṉ Aṅ ṭi Uṭpaṭa tirukkurakaippirāṉ Aṅkamāṉa paṅku mukkāla Itil Ivaṉ
kuṭuttu koṇṭa paṇam Aṟupattaiñcum tāmar Ūravarkku Ivaṉ Akamuṭai ṉ vāta kūṇi viṟṟu koṇṭa paṇamāy kuṭutta paṇam patiṉeḻum Āka paṇam Eṇpattiraṇṭum Ivaṉ Akamuṭaiṉavartākku n ku t tiru
Āḻvārum tiruppuṭkuḻiyam pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttu koṇṭa paṇattil Āḻvār poti paṇam Eḻupattaiñcum tameruravarkkuk kuṭukka veṇṭukaiyil Ivaṉ makaṉ tirukkurukaipparāṉai Iṭuvittu ci
Ivaṉ makaṉ tirukkurukaipāraṉ pramāṇam paṇṇittāka kuṭutta paṇam nūṟṟu Orupattaiñcum Āka Utakapūrva paṇam muṉṉūṟṟuṉāṟpatuṅ kuṭuttuk koṇṭa paṅku Araiyemākāṇiyum Āka varatarājapaṭṭar pātiyiṟ
y Ivaṉ Uṭaṉ piṟantakomaḷam peruvaḷḷiyat tiruṅkaṇṭi periyakoyilāmpikku vāṭkaip parūkaiyil Ivaḷukku śrī thaṉamāka kuṭutta paṅku Araiyum Iva vāttil Ivaḷ piḷḷaikaḷ nam mappiḷḷai
kakaki paṅku Araiyum Atatkāṇi Āṇṭāṉum ciṅkarum māya Ivarkaḷatu bhāvattil Ikkaṭi Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉ periyaperumāḷḷiṭṭār pramāṇam paṇṇiṉa paṇam muṉṉūṟṟil tirukkai malaril ddaka
kka tiruppukkuḻipaṭṭan Attiyū namappai perumāṉāya paṅku Araiy Irāyaperumā poticu ca śamāy vicaiyakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku Añcu ṭuvaṉ pramāṇam
Uṭpaṭa kuṭutta paṇam Aṟunūṟṟupattum Āka paṅku Iraṇṭe mūṉṟumāka kāṇikku Utakapurva Uṭpaṭak kuṭutta paṇam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟu Ippaṇam Āirattu muṉṉūṟū ṟukkum Ippaṅku Iraṇṭe
kiṇaṟu karāk kāl Āṟṟukkāl Uṭpaṭṭaraiṉaittuk kāṇi prāptikkum Ikkāṇi viḻukka kāṭṭile koḷḷakkaṭavatāka cipaṇṭārattile muṉṉāṉkille Ippaṇam Āyirattu muṉnūṟum kaikkoṇ tirunicamattu
kaṭavatāka Ippaṭi sammatittu tirunāmattu kāṇiyāka viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom tiruppukkuḻi nāyaṉār cipaṇṭārattārkku Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kaṭṭanūrāṉa Uttamacoḻacaturvvetimaṅ
kalattu taṇūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu śrī Aṉantava caiyakaṇam kopālatevaṟku yāṇṭu yaṟāvatu paṅkūṉi māsattu Oru nāḷ Aruḷāḷa
malarile Udakam paṇṇi vilaiyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koṇṭa paṇam Eḻupattu Aiñcu Ippaṇam Eḻupattu Aiñcum Iṉṉāḷile kaikkoṇṭu kūṟṟu māṇam paṇṇik kuṭutte
nāyaṉār koyiṉ śrī paṇṭārattile Ākak kuṭu paṭṭaṉ ḻakiya pāṇṭipaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Ivai Ayyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruppuṭkuḻipaṭṭaṉ Aruḷā ṉṉa §
Digital edition of SII 39.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
